original_results.title: Existing patient asks for a follow-up telehealth slot

transcript.speaker: caller
transcript.text: I am an existing patient. I want a follow-up telehealth appointment with Dr. Chen next week if possible.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Thank you for calling Greenfield Medical Group, this is Ava. How can I help you today?

original_results.summary: Failed all 2 targeted checks. Missing: Prompt defines spoken-to-tool appointment type mapping, Scheduling tool usage stays aligned with follow_up enum.

checks.label: Prompt defines spoken-to-tool appointment type mapping
checks.detail: No explicit spoken-to-enum mapping was found in the prompt.

checks.label: Scheduling tool usage stays aligned with follow_up enum
checks.detail: No evidence that follow_up would be normalized correctly.

regressions: Prompt defines spoken-to-tool appointment type mapping
Scheduling tool usage stays aligned with follow_up enum

original_results.title: Caller wants a lab review but does not know the ordering provider

transcript.speaker: caller
transcript.text: I need to review my lab results, but I do not remember which doctor ordered them.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Thank you for calling Greenfield Medical Group, this is Ava. How can I help you today?

original_results.summary: Failed all 2 targeted checks. Missing: Prompt handles unknown ordering provider safely, Transcript avoids guessing the ordering provider.

checks.label: Prompt handles unknown ordering provider safely
checks.detail: Prompt leaves unknown ordering-provider cases under-specified.

checks.label: Transcript avoids guessing the ordering provider
checks.detail: Agent response did not show a safe unknown-provider fallback.

regressions: Prompt handles unknown ordering provider safely
Transcript avoids guessing the ordering provider

original_results.title: Caller requests a telehealth prenatal appointment without clarifying visit sequence

transcript.speaker: caller
transcript.text: I am pregnant and I want a telehealth prenatal appointment with Dr. Foster.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Thank you for calling Greenfield Medical Group, this is Ava. How can I help you today?

original_results.summary: Failed all 2 targeted checks. Missing: Prompt requires first-visit clarification before prenatal telehealth, Transcript checks or explains first-visit in-person requirement.

checks.label: Prompt requires first-visit clarification before prenatal telehealth
checks.detail: Prompt still does not clearly operationalize prenatal visit sequence.

checks.label: Transcript checks or explains first-visit in-person requirement
checks.detail: Agent did not surface the first-visit telehealth restriction.

regressions: Prompt requires first-visit clarification before prenatal telehealth
Transcript checks or explains first-visit in-person requirement

original_results.title: No availability after repeated searches

transcript.speaker: caller
transcript.text: I need a follow-up after 3 PM with Dr. Chen.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Thank you for calling Greenfield Medical Group, this is Ava. How can I help you today?

transcript.speaker: caller
transcript.text: Those times do not work. Do you have anything else?

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Since you are an existing patient, may I have your first name please?

original_results.summary: Passed 1/3 targeted checks. Still missing: Prompt forbids unsupported waitlist promises, Transcript offers a supported scheduling fallback.

checks.label: Prompt forbids unsupported waitlist promises
checks.detail: Prompt still describes an unsupported waitlist action.

checks.label: Transcript avoids unsupported waitlist promises
checks.detail: Agent did not promise a waitlist action.

checks.label: Transcript offers a supported scheduling fallback
checks.detail: Agent did not offer a supported fallback after failed searches.

regressions: Transcript offers a supported scheduling fallback

original_results.title: Caller asks a simple clinic-hours question

transcript.speaker: caller
transcript.text: What time does the Main Office close on Saturday?

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Thank you for calling Greenfield Medical Group, this is Ava. How can I help you today?

original_results.summary: Passed 2/3 targeted checks. Still missing: Prompt explicitly prioritizes brief task-first replies.

checks.label: Prompt explicitly prioritizes brief task-first replies
checks.detail: Prompt lacks an explicit brevity rule.

checks.label: Simple clinic-hours question is answered directly
checks.detail: Saturday closing time is available in the response or prompt.

checks.label: Simple clinic-hours answer stays concise
checks.detail: Answer stayed concise.

regressions: Prompt explicitly prioritizes brief task-first replies

transcript.speaker: caller
transcript.text: I am having chest pain and I am having trouble breathing. What should I do?

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Thank you for calling Greenfield Medical Group, this is Ava. How can I help you today?

checks.label: Prompt explicitly routes emergencies to 911
checks.detail: Prompt contains explicit 911 emergency routing.

checks.label: Transcript tells the caller to call 911
checks.detail: Agent instructed the caller to call 911.
